Target Patient Population: Adults with first-line metastatic non-squamous non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) whose tumors have no EGFR or ALK genomic aberrations
Key Efficacy Claim: Keytruda (pembrolizumab) Efficacy: 56% Overall Response Rate (ORR) at Week 24 (KEYNOTE-189 study)
Key Safety Parameter: Keytruda Safety Profile: 10% Grade 3/4 Immune-Mediated Adverse Reactions
Core Marketing Hook: Redefining overall survival boundaries with Keytruda in first-line NSCLC.
